description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add 2 balcony tickets to your cart for the least expensive November concert where balcony seats cost no more than $25 each.
tasks.name: Add 2 balcony tickets to your cart for the least expensive November concert where balcony seats cost no more than $25 each.
tasks.description: Add 2 balcony tickets to your cart for the least expensive November concert where balcony seats cost no more than $25 each.

tasks.instruction: Submit an application for the adult community chorus as an Alto who is only available on Tuesday evenings and has 5 years of choral experience.
tasks.name: Submit an application for the adult community chorus as an Alto who is only available on Tuesday evenings and has 5 years of choral experience.
tasks.description: Submit an application for the adult community chorus as an Alto who is only available on Tuesday evenings and has 5 years of choral experience.

tasks.instruction: Sign up as an usher for the earliest March event that starts at or after 6:00 PM by choosing the first available pre-concert usher shift and completing the volunteer form.
tasks.name: Sign up as an usher for the earliest March event that starts at or after 6:00 PM by choosing the first available pre-concert usher shift and completing the volunteer form.
tasks.description: Sign up as an usher for the earliest March event that starts at or after 6:00 PM by choosing the first available pre-concert usher shift and completing the volunteer form.

tasks.instruction: Add the first 3 alphabetically listed contemporary pieces composed in or after the year 2000 to a practice list.
tasks.name: Add the first 3 alphabetically listed contemporary pieces composed in or after the year 2000 to a practice list.
tasks.description: Add the first 3 alphabetically listed contemporary pieces composed in or after the year 2000 to a practice list.

tasks.instruction: Start registration for a youth choir program that accepts 10-year-olds and rehearses on weekends, enrolling 1 singer in the first available weekend rehearsal slot and proceeding to the summary step.
tasks.name: Start registration for a youth choir program that accepts 10-year-olds and rehearses on weekends, enrolling 1 singer in the first available weekend rehearsal slot and proceeding to the summary step.
tasks.description: Start registration for a youth choir program that accepts 10-year-olds and rehearses on weekends, enrolling 1 singer in the first available weekend rehearsal slot and proceeding to the summary step.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the email newsletter with monthly frequency, selecting only Concert Updates and Volunteer Opportunities as your interests.
tasks.name: Subscribe to the email newsletter with monthly frequency, selecting only Concert Updates and Volunteer Opportunities as your interests.
tasks.description: Subscribe to the email newsletter with monthly frequency, selecting only Concert Updates and Volunteer Opportunities as your interests.

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time $35 donation designated to the scholarship-focused fund and set the public recognition name to "Anonymous Singer."
tasks.name: Make a one-time $35 donation designated to the scholarship-focused fund and set the public recognition name to "Anonymous Singer."
tasks.description: Make a one-time $35 donation designated to the scholarship-focused fund and set the public recognition name to "Anonymous Singer."

tasks.instruction: Add 3 general admission tickets for the first Sunday family-friendly concert in June that begins between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM to your cart.

target_names: Sunday Family Concert: Around the World

tasks.name: Add 3 general admission tickets for the first Sunday family-friendly concert in June that begins between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM to your cart.
tasks.description: Add 3 general admission tickets for the first Sunday family-friendly concert in June that begins between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Using the concerts list, find the next upcoming event at the downtown venue and send an accessibility inquiry via the contact form asking about wheelchair seating for that specific concert.
tasks.name: Using the concerts list, find the next upcoming event at the downtown venue and send an accessibility inquiry via the contact form asking about wheelchair seating for that specific concert.
